name: @forwardimpact/librepl
description: Agent-friendly interactive REPL — exploratory interfaces that humans and agents navigate the same way.
author: D. Olsson <hi@senzilla.io>

jobs.trigger: Building an interface and realizing agents can't discover or navigate it the same way humans do.
jobs.bigHire: give agents and humans the same interface so capabilities don't need separate paths.
jobs.littleHire: add a capability and know both humans and agents can reach it without a separate integration.
jobs.competesWith: hand-written argument parsing; separate agent and human interfaces; tolerating agents that can't self-serve
